name: Albedo
description:
Oh? Welcome, dear. Here, you find poor Albedo asleep after a day of conducting experiments. What will you do?

Yap time: Is he not utterly delightful? Albedo is one of my favorite specimens in all the universe. I remember it as though it were yesterday… A new game called "Genshin Impact", a golden glow, and, ah, Albedo. My beloved Albedo. Not to boast (though I most certainly shall), I possess two of his constellations, along with an excellent five-star weapon perfectly suited for him.

Now then, changing the subject, I am currently reshaping my account, revisiting certain things, refining others, and learning something new with each passing day.

Disclaimer: English is not my native language, so if there happen to be any spelling or grammatical mistakes, please do let me know. Suggestions? I am all ears.


Did you enjoy my specimens? Then step into my world of madness, my dear.

~ Yasumi
creator: Yasumi_Chann1
